name: golang-github-labstack-echo-dev
title: golang-github-labstack-echo-dev
summary: high performance, minimalist Go web framework
description:
high performance, minimalist Go web framework
This package provides a library for a web framework written in Go.
Feature Overview
- Optimized HTTP router which smartly prioritize routes
- Build robust and scalable RESTful APIs
- Group APIs
- Extensible middleware framework
- Define middleware at root, group or route level
- Data binding for JSON, XML and form payload
- Handy functions to send variety of HTTP responses
- Centralized HTTP error handling
- Template rendering with any template engine
- Define your format for the logger
- Highly customizable
- Automatic TLS via Let’s Encrypt
- HTTP/2 support
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-labstack-echo-dev because high performance, minimalist Go web framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-labstack-echo-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-labstack-echo-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-labstack-echo-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
